title: UGC NET June 2026 Overview

detail.title: UGC NET June 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: UGC NET Apply Online 2026 Date is from 29 April 2026 to 20 May 2026 (up to 11:50 PM). The National Testing Agency has officially released the UGC NET 2026 June Application Form notification on its official website.

content.text: The UGC NET 2026 June Application Form Date has been officially announced by the National Testing Agency through its latest notification. Candidates can apply online from 29 April 2026 to 20 May 2026 (11:50 PM) via the official website ugcnet.nta.ac.in. This exam is conducted for determining eligibility for Assistant Professor and Junior Research Fellowship (JRF) across India. Candidates must ensure they complete the application process within the deadline and follow all instructions mentioned in the official notification. This article provides complete verified details including dates, fees, eligibility, and application process.
Direct Link to get The UGC NET 2026 Notification: Click Here

sections.heading: UGC NET 2026 June Important Dates (Official PDF)

rows: Master’s Degree or equivalent from recognized university

sections.heading: How to Apply for UGC NET June 2026

items: Click on UGC NET June 2026 Application Form
Register using email ID & mobile number
Includes reasoning, comprehension, ICT, research methodology
